name: Olive Bread (from My Garden)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a bowl, mix together the chopped calamata olives and chopped rosemary.
3. Combine the olive mixture with the pizza dough and knead gently until combined.
4. Form the dough into a circular ring shape.
5. Place the ring on a lightly oiled baking sheet and brush with olive oil.
6. Bake for 35 minutes.
7. Serve hot or warm.
